creator: anatoly.borodin@gmail.com
text:
Hi All!

The problem is with ${PREFIX}/etc/sudoers.d - it is not beeing created after
the update, and is required by the sudoers file.

You can try to create a dir etc/sudoers.d with 0750 as a workaround, or
comment (with a second #) the last line of sudoers.

-- 
Mit freundlichen GrÃ¼Ãen,
